entries.notes: Target: beat May baseline. 6 blog posts publish in June, including 3 GEO/AEO articles structured for search and AI citation. Set improvement target once May baseline is known.

entries.entry: Email Click Rate — Ryyu Launch Sequence
entries.notes: 6-email Ryyu launch sequence runs around June 15 launch date. Track aggregate click rate across the sequence. Benchmark for warm B2B lists: 5–10%. CTA emails expected to drive highest clicks.
June portion. 10 total for the May–June cycle. Ryyu Voice/Engine new segment outreach should start contributing here.

Brand Alignment Diagnostic shipped May 27. June is the compounding window — lead magnet warms the June 15 Ryyu launch funnel. Target 50 downloads across May 27–Jun 30 via LinkedIn post, IG post, newsletter feature, and blog CTA.
Ryyu launch month. Launch announcement post (June 15) and product-fit carousel expected to drive saves + reach. Set target once May Diagnostic-launch reach is known.
Sustained 15%+ target. GEO/AEO and rebrand articles targeted at this ICP should keep engagement high through June.
Higher target in June as Ryyu content compounds and new segment outreach picks up. Pipeline priority: Ryyu Voice + Engine.
Two sends: June 11 + June 25. June 11 send is the pre-Ryyu-launch warmup (4 days out). June 25 is the post-launch roundup. Log the average of both sends.

Conversations traceable to a content piece (blog, LinkedIn, IG, or email). Ask in every discovery call. Lower target in May — Ryyu launch takes time to compound.

Both have close_date BEFORE create_date — appears to be backfilled historical data, not live pipeline tracking. Sales cycle calc not reliable until HubSpot deal lifecycle is being captured in real time.
